seoTitle: Catterick vs Caversham — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Catterick and Caversham. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Catterick and Caversham.
heading: Catterick vs Caversham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Catterick, Western Australia and Caversham, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Caversham has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Catterick (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Catterick or Caversham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Catterick has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Caversham scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Catterick scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Caversham scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Catterick or Caversham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Caversham has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
